summary: Iteration 3 retest of the two remaining bugs from iteration 2. BOTH FIXES VERIFIED — 2/2 PASS. (1) URL ?program=Tiny%20Tots preselect now populates enquiry-program-select trigger with 'Tiny Tots · Ages 2-4' (fix via key={defaultProgram} remounting EnquiryForm). Full enquiry submission flow with age=5 years also produced enquiry-success. (2) Mobile drawer at 375x812 now renders with bounding box height=732px (>400); all 6 nav-mobile-link-* items visible/clickable; tapping nav-mobile-link-about navigated to /about and closed the drawer.
passed_tests: URL preselect: /admissions?program=Tiny%20Tots#enquiry — trigger text = 'Tiny Tots · Ages 2-4'.
Full enquiry submit with preselected program + age '5 years' + name/email/phone/message → enquiry-success element appeared.
Mobile drawer 375x812: nav-mobile-menu bounding box = {x:0, y:80, width:375, height:732}.
All 6 mobile links visible: home, programs, about, gallery, admissions, contact.
Tap nav-mobile-link-about → navigated to /about and drawer unmounted (count=0).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix approach for URL preselect via key={defaultProgram || 'default'} on EnquiryForm correctly remounts the form so useForm picks up the new defaultValues. Works as expected.

Mobile drawer now uses 'fixed inset-x-0 top-20 h-[calc(100vh-5rem)]' which yields a deterministic height — good fix; consider also adding `overscroll-contain` and `role="dialog" aria-modal="true"` for accessibility on future iterations (non-blocking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bugs from iterations 1 and 2 are now resolved. Backend was healthy in iteration 1 and skipped here. Full regression list passing: URL ?program preselect, enquiry submit, testimonials carousel + dot active state, contact form smoke, footer newsletter, auto-scroll to #enquiry, mobile drawer open/links/close. No outstanding issues observed in this run.
rca_of_the_issue: Both prior issues are resolved at the source. (a) URL preselect: previously the Select trigger remained on placeholder because useForm's defaultValues had captured program='' on first render and a later setValue didn't reliably re-flow to the controlled Radix Select's value prop in this context. Adding key={defaultProgram || 'default'} on <EnquiryForm/> forces React to unmount and remount the component when defaultProgram changes from '' to 'Tiny Tots', so useForm re-initializes with the correct defaultValue and form.watch('program') returns 'Tiny Tots' on the first render of the remounted instance. (b) Mobile drawer height 0: previously used fixed top:20 bottom:0 left:0 right:0 which in this layout context produced computed height 0. Replacing with explicit h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] under fixed inset-x-0 top-20 yields a deterministic 732px height on the 812px viewport (812 - 80 = 732), matching expectations.
